pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping the version at 17 would result in bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or fail strict JDK 21 build checks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework dependencies to version 6.x which requires Jakarta EE and JDK 17+.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 6.x does not support the javax.* namespace and requires JDK 17+; using Spring 5.x with JDK 21 is unsupported and causes runtime/compile errors due to missing javax classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation-api with jakarta.annotation-api to comply with the Jakarta EE namespace migration required by Spring 6 and JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is removed from the JDK module system in later versions and replaced by Jakarta; code or dependencies expecting javax will fail to compile or link.

pom.xml.general_idea: Enable Jakarta EE support in the OpenAPI generator configuration to generate code using jakarta.* annotations instead of javax.*.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this flag, the generator produces code using javax.* annotations which are incompatible with the Jakarta EE environment required by Spring 6 and JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Hibernate Validator to version 8.x which is compatible with Jakarta EE and Spring 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: Hibernate Validator 6.x depends on javax.validation; version 8.x is required for Jakarta EE compatibility.
